zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice Baggard於1299年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾霍德特時，她的父親Richard Baggard31歲，母親Alice Bickehom24歲。她和Sir William de Hill of Bridgnorth至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1360年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾享年61歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alice Baggard于1299年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾霍德特时，她的父亲Richard Baggard31岁，母亲Alice Bickehom24岁。她和Sir William de Hill of Bridgnorth至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1360年在英国英格兰史洛普爾享年61岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Baggard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): variant of Hawkyard, a habitational name from Hawk Yard in Saddleworth (Yorkshire).

English: nickname from Middle English, Old French hagard ‘wild, untamed’. This word was adopted into Middle English as a technical term in falconry to denote a hawk that had been captured and trained when already fully grown, rather than being reared in captivity; the surname may have developed as a metonymic occupational name for a falconer.
English: possibly also a variant of Agar with prosthetic H- and excrescent -d.

variants.name: Agar
meanings: from a Middle English personal name, either Egar (see Edgar ) or Algar (see Alger ).
variant of Hager , with loss of initial H-.

variants.name: Haggar
meanings: English: variant of   Haggard   or   Agar  .

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice Baggard was born in 1299, in Hodnet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard Baggard, was 31 and her mother, Alice Bickehom, was 24. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Sir William de Hill of Bridgnorth. She died in 1360, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61, and was buried in London, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice Baggard est née en 1299, à Hodnet, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Baggard, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Alice Bickehom, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Sir William de Hill of Bridgnorth. Elle est décédée en 1360, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Alice Baggard 1299 in Hodnet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Baggard 31 und ihre Mutter Alice Bickehom 24. Sie hatte mit Sir William de Hill of Bridgnorth mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1360 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in London, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Baggard è nata il nel 1299 nel Hodnet, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Richard Baggard, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Alice Bickehom, aveva 24 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Sir William de Hill of Bridgnorth. Morì nel 1360, nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a London, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Baggardが1299年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアホードネットで生まれた時，父Richard Baggardは31歳，母Alice Bickehomは24歳であった。彼女はSir William de Hill of Bridgnorthとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1360年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアで61歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Baggard(이)가 1299년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 호드넷에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Baggard(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Bickehom(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Sir William de Hill of Bridgnorth(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1360년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Baggard nasceu em 1299, em Hodnet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Baggard, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Alice Bickehom, tinha 24 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Sir William de Hill of Bridgnorth. Ela faleceu em 1360, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice Baggard родилась в 1299 г. в местности ходнет, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard Baggard было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Bickehom, 24. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Sir William de Hill of Bridgnorth. Она умерла в 1360 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Alice Baggard nació en 1299, en Hodnet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Baggard, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Alice Bickehom, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Sir William de Hill of Bridgnorth. Murió en 1360, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
